examples.title: Using global directives
examples.description: Global using directives apply to all files in your project, eliminating the need to repeat common imports in every file.

examples.title: Global static using
examples.description: Use global static using to import static members from a type once for the entire project.

relatedFeatures.reason: Start with File-Scoped Namespaces when you want an earlier building block for Global Using.
Continue to Top-level statements for the next guide in this theme.
Explore using static for another earlier stepping stone in the same theme.
